17.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve Review: The Presta Valve Killer? - Bikerumor
17.evidenceText: Schwalbe introduced Clik Valves in July of 2024, presenting a novel new design with the goal of creating a new standard and replacing the
17.extractionRationale: The provided source content does not contain any information about bicycle brands or models with pre-installed Clik valves for model years 2026 or 2027. The excerpt only describes the introduction of Clik Valves in general. No OEM adoption data for specific model years is mentioned in the available evidence.

45.evidenceText: The DT Swiss tubeless valve perfectly matches DT Swiss rims, to ensure a perfect seal. All DT Swiss wheelsets are tubeless compatible and the ASM versions come tubeless ready, equipped with tubeless tape and valves.
45.extractionRationale: DT Swiss explicitly uses their own proprietary "DT Swiss tubeless valve" rather than adopting Clik. No evidence from the provided sources indicates adoption of Clik by DT Swiss or any other major brand (Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, Roval). Therefore, 0% of major brands have adopted Clik as standard.

57.evidenceText: No stock status, availability dates, or restock information found in any of the four product listing pages provided.
57.extractionRationale: All four sources are product listing pages that contain feature descriptions and product images but no explicit restock dates, back-in-stock information, current availability status, or turnaround time data. Without specific dates or stock status indicators, the restock turnaround time cannot be determined.
